description:
Simple cross platform two-factor authentication app.

Authme is a two-factor authentication app, you can import from QR codes or Google Authenticator QR codes.
Authme 6.1.1
- 2025.07.08. (Standard update)
Improvement
- Warn if WebView2 is not installed
- Updated Tauri and other packages
- Improved HTML export
Bug
- Correctly decode 2FA names
